contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Edgar->dao_protocol cutover: PR8 roadmap + PR8a (signature endpoints)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/342
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/62
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/344
  
  Details:
  Scoped + started finishing the Edgar->dao_protocol /dao/* cutover (toward retiring the duplicate DAO code in sentiment_importer that confuses LLMs).
  
  - Audited the Rails dao_controller vs live nginx routing vs the running Python service: corrected the premise — only submit_contribution was actually off Rails; the other 4 /dao/* routes (verify-signature, check_digital_signature, link_upc, express_submit_contribution) are STILL live AND still called (POS integrations + DApp + CLI), so each must be ported, not just deleted.
  - Wrote the PR8 roadmap into EDGAR_DAO_EXTRACTION_PLAN.md (sequenced easy->hard PR8a-d, usage audit, parity harness, resume tracker).
  - PR8a shipped: ported POST /dao/verify-signature + GET /dao/check_digital_signature to the Python dao_protocol service (reusing crypto/verify + the contributors-signatures sheet adapter, which I extended to return the contributor name). 10 new tests; full suite 80 passed. Deployed gate-off to :8010; parity-verified check_digital_signature is an exact-match vs live Rails. Also documented the rate_limit_bot_calls 401-on-curl gotcha.
  
  PRs: agentic_ai_context#342, dao_protocol#62, agentic_ai_context#344.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
